error[E0503]: cannot use `x` because it was mutably borrowed
 --> benchmark_results/2026-05-10T00-24-35/gemma-3-12b/expressions/compound_literals_2/sample_001/target.rs:5:16

3 |     let mut p = &mut x;
  |                 ------ `x` is borrowed here
4 |

  |                ^ use of borrowed `x`
6 |     *p = arr[0];
  |     ----------- borrow later used here
